Karen initially managed our Data Warehousing team supporting the Fiber line of business. In addition to leading the team, she personally architected and designed the data warehouse along with its underlying dimensional data model.  Her strong technical expertise combined with her deep understanding of the business and data quickly made her the go-to subject matter expert for the platform.  She has the unique ability to translate complex business requirements into scalable, well-designed technical solutions.  Karen later transitioned into Scrum Master and then Product Owner for the Data Platform Engineering team, where she played a pivotal role in advancing our agile maturity.  She was instrumental in strengthening our agile practices, improving planning discipline, and driving better cross-team collaboration.  Her exceptional organizational skills enabled her to effectively coordinate work across multiple development teams while maintaining alignment with strategic priorities.  What truly sets Karen apart is her excellent judgment and decision-making ability.  She works independently with confidence, leads teams effectively, and consistently drives initiatives forward with clarity and accountability

Big day. One I’ve been looking forward to for a long time. After 18+ incredible years at Crown Castle and taking a leap 6 months ago to join Zayo to help build the landing strip... today it’s official… welcome to all my Crown friends and family. Truly special to see this come full circle. This combination creates something powerful: unmatched fiber scale, deeper enterprise reach, and the infrastructure backbone needed to fuel the next wave of AI and digital growth. Excited doesn’t even begin to cover it. Proud of the journey, grateful for the people, and fired up for what’s ahead. I am excited to share that I’ve started at WHOOP as an AI Experiences Product Manager Intern in Boston!

After spending the past several years at the intersection of medicine, technology, and consumer health, I’m especially excited to work on products that help people better understand their health and performance in ways that are actionable, personalized, and meaningful.

I’m grateful for the opportunity to learn from the WHOOP team, contribute to AI-driven product experiences, and spend the summer in Boston.

...
Lets goo! Presenting a short paper and taxonomy of failure modes when operationalizing agentic systems at ACM CAIS 2026 , workshop on AI Agents for Discovery in the Wild (AID-Wild)! 

The research paper surfaces what I believe to be an important idea: tacit organizational knowledge is out of reach for many deployed agentic systems, leading to a cascade of potential semantic failures. How should we treat these semantic vs technical failures in production, and how can they be successfully mitigated? 

Full paper can be found here: https://lnkd.in/gggYSUme

results.title: Data Scientist / Machine Learning Engineer (Generative AI Focus) - Strategic Staffing Solutions
highlights:
Data Scientist / Machine Learning Engineer (Generative AI Focus) - Strategic Staffing Solutions
...
# Data Scientist / Machine Learning Engineer (Generative AI Focus)
...
Job Title: Data Scientist / Machine Learning Engineer (Generative AI Focus)Contract Length: 12+ Months Hybrid schedule 3 days per week onsite/ 2 remoteLocation: Charlotte, NC/ Irving, TX/ Boston, MA
...
We are seeking a highly motivated Data Scientist / Machine Learning Engineer to build advanced analytics and Generative AI (Gen AI) solutions across multiple business functions. This role combines strong data analysis capabilities with machine learning and emerging Gen AI techniques to drive business insights, automation, and innovation.
...
The ideal candidate is hands-on, analytical, and comfortable owning the full lifecycle of data science solutions—from problem definition through model development and deployment—while collaborating closely with engineering and business stakeholders.
...
- Perform in-depth data analysis and exploration using SQL and statistical techniques to uncover patterns, solve business problems, and support data-driven decision-making.
...
- Design, develop, and implement scalable solutions using Python or Java.
...
- Utilize data science and machine learning libraries such as NumPy, SciPy, Matplotlib, and Scikit-learn.
...
- Build reusable pipelines for data processing, feature engineering, and model evaluation.
...
- Develop and evaluate machine learning models, including tree-based and ensemble algorithms such as Random Forest and XGBoost.
...
- Assess model performance, tune hyperparameters, and ensure models meet business and technical requirements.
...
- Apply AI-assisted techniques to enhance productivity and insights.
...
- Craft effective prompts using Gemini or similar generative AI models to support data exploration, feature generation, analysis, and summarization.
...
- Strong SQL and data analysis skills.
- Experience working with structured and semi-structured datasets.
- Proficiency in Python or Java for data science, machine learning, and analytical workloads.
- Hands-on experience with machine learning frameworks and model development.
- Experience building, training, and evaluating predictive models in production or near-production environments.
...
- Ability to work independently and own initiatives end-to-end,
...
problem definition and requirements gathering through solution delivery and validation.
- Experience using generative AI models to augment analytical workflows.
- Familiarity with prompt engineering.
- Experience leveraging large language models (LLMs) for automation and analytical tasks.
- Experience integrating Gen AI capabilities into analytical processes.

Generative AI Focus

- Develop and deploy Gen AI solutions that enhance productivity, automate workflows, and generate AI-driven business insights.
- Apply foundational knowledge of Gen AI concepts, tools, and use cases.
- Experience with large language models (LLMs), prompt engineering, or AI-assisted analytics.
- Strong interest in emerging AI technologies and a willingness to continuously learn and apply new Gen AI innovations.
...
Ideal Candidate Profile
...
- Self-driven data professional with strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
- Combines practical machine learning expertise with emerging AI capabilities.
- Comfortable navigating ambiguous problems and translating business needs into technical solutions.
- Capable of delivering measurable business outcomes.
- Strong communication skills with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
- Passionate about applying traditional machine learning and modern Generative AI techniques to solve complex business challenges.

results.title: Engr III Cslt-AI Science, Chennai, India | Verizon Careers
highlights:
Engr III Cslt-AI Science, Chennai, India | Verizon Careers
...
# Engr III Cslt-AI Science
...
- Chennai, India
- Hyderabad, India
...
This role will focus on architecting, developing, and deploying end-to-end, AI-powered commercial applications. This is a high-impact, individual contributor role demanding deep technical expertise across the modern software engineering stack and AI/Machine Learning methodologies
...
The Full Stack AI Engineer will work closely with data science, software engineering, and product teams at Verizon to proactively design and develop intelligent applications. These capabilities will encompass generative AI, predictive, prescriptive, and adaptive applications for all inferences at Verizon. Solutions will be implemented seamlessly from the user interface (front-end) to the database and infrastructure layer (back-end/cloud), operating in real-time, streaming, and batch modes depending on business needs.
...
At Verizon, we are on a multi-year journey to industrialize our data science and AI capabilities. Very simply, this means that AI will fuel all decisions and user experiences across the company. At $130B+ in annual revenue, this is a pioneering opportunity to design and shape full-stack AI at scale in the Telco industry. With our leadership in bringing 5G networks nationwide, the opportunity for AI will only grow exponentially. Therefore, it is critical that this candidate possesses proven experience in not just researching AI techniques, but actively engineering the scalable, full-stack applications that bring them to life.
...
Architect and Develop End-to-End AI Applications
...
Lead the full-stack development of next-generation AI applications, ensuring seamless integration between complex AI models (LLMs, predictive models) and modern web interfaces.
...
Design and deploy scalable APIs and microservices to serve machine learning models using modern frameworks (e.g., FastAPI, Node.js, GraphQL).
...
Develop intuitive, responsive front-end interfaces (React, Next.js, Vue) that allow users to interact with AI models effectively.
...
Implement robust backend architectures incorporating traditional and modern databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Vector Databases like Pinecone or Milvus for RAG architectures).
...
Operate as an expert and thought leader in both Full Stack Engineering and AI/MLOps, establishing best practices for the CI/CD of machine learning applications.
...
Elevate the AI Practice
...
Partner with academia and the startup ecosystem to identify new AI approaches (e.g., Agentic AI, advanced GenAI workflows) and modern software tools that deliver value to Verizon.
...
looking for…
...
You will need to have:
...
Bachelor’s degree or four or more years of work experience.
...
Experience independently developing algorithms, writing production-grade code, and deploying complex software/AI solutions to production.
...
Experience scaling AI in commercial applications (e.g., Generative AI, Large Language Models (LLMs), Personalization, Computer Vision) and integrating them into full-stack applications.
...
Full Stack Development: Expertise in modern backend languages and frameworks (Python/FastAPI, Node.js, Go).Strong proficiency in modern frontend frameworks (React, Next.js, TypeScript/JavaScript, TailwindCSS).
...
AI/ML & Data Engineering: Deep understanding of underlying math/algorithms combined with expertise in ML frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow) and ML libraries (Scikit-learn, Hugging Face).Hands-on experience with modern AI stacks (LangChain, LlamaIndex, OpenAI APIs) and Vector Databases.
...
Infrastructure & Data: Experience with building and maintaining streaming and batch data pipelines (Kafka, Spark) in production.Strong knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, GCP) and container orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes).
...
Core Competencies: Exposure to advanced data structures, data modeling, and modern software architecture patterns.
...

# Principal AI/ML Engineer

### What you’ll be doing...
...
DUTIES: Responsible for AI/ML applications implementation, performance tuning, and scaling (20%). Lead the cloud solutions planning, configuration, deployment, and operation (20%). Provide application design guidance to modernize existing applications or write new AI applications (20%). Lead reporting and analytical systems to solve Big Data problems that drive customer satisfaction throughout our business (10%). Build and handle machine learning pipelines on a Hadoop cluster to support any kind of model deployment on streaming or batch data using tools like PySpark and Jupyter Notebook (10%). Investigate, design, test and implement efficient software solutions (10%). Support new initiatives in 5G and Intelligent Edge Network work streams (10%).
...
REQUIREMENTS: Bachelor’s or foreign equivalent degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field and 6 years of progressive, post-baccalaureate experience in the job offered or as a software engineer, database engineer/administrator, consultant, or in a similar/related position. Experience therein to include 6 years with a scripting language like Python, Unix Shell, Perl, or JavaScript for automation of build tasks; 2 years in hosting an application on GCP (Google Cloud Platform), working with Big Data, PySpark, Jupyter, Kubernetes Engine, CI/CD tools like Concourse or Jenkins, and monitoring tools like App Dynamics, NewRelic, or Grafana; and 2 years working with large language models (LLMs), VectorDB, GraphDB, and finetuning LLMs, and model performance evaluation, including Retrieval, Generation, and other GenAI use cases. Hybrid role, ability to work from home.

We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer to develop advanced AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector. The role requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems.
...
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems

Python AWS Azure GCP Databricks LangChain LangGraph LlamaIndex Hugging Face AutoGen
...
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. This is a high-impact role where your work directly supports the modernization and efficiency of energy systems.Accountabilities
...
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems.

- Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development.

...
- Support database design and optimization, including writing efficient queries for large-scale data processing and retrieval.
...
- Translate complex machine learning and AI requirements into structured technical tasks and actionable development plans.
...
- Stay current with advancements in machine learning engineering, generative AI, and AI orchestration, integrating best practices into workflows.
...
- Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Software Engineering, or related field (PhD preferred).
...
- 7+ years of experience building, deploying, and maintaining machine learning systems in production environments.
...
- Strong proficiency in Python, including experience building reusable packages and scalable data pipelines.
...
- Hands-on experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP, including CI/CD and containerized deployments.
...
- Solid understanding of ML system design, MLOps principles, and end-to-end model lifecycle management.
...
- Experience with distributed computing frameworks and relational/non-relational databases.
...
- Familiarity with Databricks and large-scale data processing environments.
...
- Experience working with generative AI frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, Hugging Face, or AutoGen.
...
- Exposure to agentic AI systems, AI orchestration, or LLM-based decision workflows is highly desirable.
...
- Nice to have: experience in the utility, energy, or power sector and strong Databricks expertise.

...
- Or specialized experience in runtime optimizations, model quantization, compression, on-device inference, GPU inference, pytorch, kernel development
...

...
- PhD in AI, machine learning, data science, or related technical fields.

- Publications at peer-reviewed AI conferences (e.g., NeurIPS, CVPR, ICML, ICLR, ICCV, and ACL).
...

results.title: Data Scientist at CrowdStrike - United States Remote
highlights:
Data Scientist at CrowdStrike - United States Remote
...
🤖 Artificial Intelligence
...
CrowdStrike is a cybersecurity company that provides cloud-based security services to stop breaches. It is recognized as a leader in endpoint protection, identity and cloud security, and managed detection and response. CrowdStrike's platform, Falcon, integrates artificial intelligence to offer real-time visibility, detection, and protection against sophisticated cyber threats. The company is lauded for its effectiveness in securing networks and data, making it a trusted partner for businesses worldwide.
...
# Data Scientist
...
🤖 Artificial Intelligence
...
CrowdStrike is a cybersecurity company that provides cloud-based security services to stop breaches. It is recognized as a leader in endpoint protection, identity and cloud security, and managed detection and response. CrowdStrike's platform, Falcon, integrates artificial intelligence to offer real-time visibility, detection, and protection against sophisticated cyber threats. The company is lauded for its effectiveness in securing networks and data, making it a trusted partner for businesses worldwide.
...
### 📋 Description
...
• Work at the intersection of Artificial Intelligence and Threat Research • Work closely with subject-matter experts in cybersecurity to understand analyst workflows and their security operations procedures • Post-train LLMs and agents — supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning (RLHF/RLAIF, PPO/GRPO/DPO, reward modeling) — to automate analyst procedures and improve reliability on real security tasks • Devise AI agents and combine them into increasingly complex workflows: planning and reasoning loops, tool and function calling, and retrieval and memory • Research new approaches to agentic planning, and prototype state-of-the-art methods from the literature • Establish objective criteria for benchmarking agentic systems — evals, LLM-as-judge pipelines, and trajectory-level metrics, with real statistical rigor • Optimize prompts and inference to get the most out of every model • Collaborate and coordinate across Engineering, Data Science, and Managed Services teams, and partner with engineers to take prototypes toward production • Keep track of developments in the field of Artificial Intelligence and help identify, define, and prioritize areas for research
...
### 🎯 Requirements
...
• Excellent foundations in machine learning, probability, and statistics, with sound instincts for uncertainty, statistical skew/variance, and experimental design • PhD-level depth of understanding in modern machine learning research —a doctorate itself is not required, but we expect equivalent mastery, including the ability to read, critique, implement, and improve upon current papers • Experience training generative models, with a strong command of LLM training fundamentals (architecture, optimization, tokenization, data, and scaling behavior) • Reinforcement learning / post-training as a core skill: RLHF/RLAIF, policy optimization (PPO/GRPO/DPO), reward modeling, and building RL environments for agents • Experience building agentic systems: agent architectures (ReAct, planning, reflection), tool and function calling, and retrieval/memory/context management • Experience with systematic prompt optimization, and with designing and building evals for LLM systems • Fluency with GPUs, PyTorch, and the common LLM training and serving stack (e.g., Hugging Face Transformers/TRL/PEFT, DeepSpeed/FSDP, vLLM/TGI/SGLang) • Strong, reproducible research engineering: clean Python and disciplined experiment tracking that your collaborators can build on • Ability to work independently on ambiguous and complex objectives, and to communicate clearly within a large project team
...

“I have worked closely with Shahbaaz Syed at Constellation Energy for the past nine months, and he has proven to be a dedicated, consistent, and reliable engineer who has made a high impact on the team. He takes full responsibility and ownership of his work, often working beyond normal business hours to ensure tasks are completed before sprint deadlines.
...
He contributed meaningfully to the Nuclear AI Team's efforts in ingestion, evaluation, and document processing. He built an end-to-end Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline using Azure AI Search, custom Document Intelligence, and Azure OpenAI embeddings. He is detail-oriented, ensuring that any new documents following the same template pass all edge cases. He automated the ingestion of regulatory PDFs into Azure Blob Storage via Synapse and created labeled ground truth datasets used to train machine learning models aligned with federal reporting standards. He processed complex regulatory documents, configured Azure components, and developed custom Azure Functions for document extraction deployed via Bicep. He also generated negative samples for evaluation and supported mapping between internal and regulatory records.
...
Shahbaaz is also a team player. One of his most significant contributions was creating onboarding documentation to quickly enable developers to access the Oracle SQL database, Linux development containers, and Git repository. He regularly helped teammates debug pipelines, resolve Git and launch configuration issues, and understand Azure indexer behavior. He submitted clean, well-documented pull requests and actively participated in design sessions, sprint planning, and cross-functional discussions.

# Generative Artificial Intelligence Architect (Remote)
...
Jun 1
...
, 2026
...
- AI System Architecture: Design and develop the architecture and infrastructure for AI systems, including data storage, processing, and retrieval mechanisms. Ensure scalability, flexibility, and efficiency of the system to handle large volumes of data and complex algorithms.
...
- Algorithm Development: Develop and implement advanced AI algorithms and models, including machine learning, deep learning, and neural networks. Continuously evaluate and improve algorithms to enhance system performance and accuracy.
...
- Data Integration: Identify relevant data sources and design methods for data collection, integration, cleansing, and transformation. Collaborate with data scientists and engineers to ensure quality and relevance of data for AI model training.
...
- Model Training and Evaluation: Train AI models using supervised, unsupervised, or reinforcement learning techniques. Implement evaluation methodologies to measure the performance and effectiveness of trained models. Fine-tune models based on feedback and data insights.
...
- Neural Network Design: Design and optimize deep learning neural networks for various AI tasks, such as natural language processing, computer vision, recommendation systems, and predictive analytics. Implement innovative architectures and techniques to improve model accuracy and efficiency.
...
- System Integration: Collaborate with software developers and engineers to integrate AI systems into existing platforms or applications. Ensure seamless communication and compatibility between AI components and other software modules.
...
- Ethical and Responsible AI: Ensure
...
fairness, transparency
...
and accountability. Address biases and
...
risks associated with AI systems to
...
- Research and Innovation: Stay updated with the latest advancements in AI technologies, frameworks, and algorithms. Conduct research and experimentation to explore new approaches and techniques that can enhance AI capabilities.
...
- Collaboration and Communication: Collaborate with multi-functional teams, including data scientists, software engineers, and business partners, to define AI requirements and deliver AI solutions that meet business objectives. Communicate complex AI concepts and solutions effectively to both technical and non-technical team members.
...
- Qualifications:
...
- A Bachelor's or equivalent experience or Master's degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, or related field.
- Proven experience in designing and developing AI systems, including machine learning, deep learning, and neural networks.
...
- Strong programming skills in languages such as Python, R, or Java. Familiarity with AI libraries, frameworks, and tools such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, or Keras.
...
- Solid understanding of cloud computing platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) and experience deploying AI models on these platforms.
...
- Comprehension of AI concepts, algorithms, and methodologies.
...
- Knowledge of designing large scale AI solutions, data integration, cleansing, and transformation techniques.
...
- Familiarity with BigData platforms and technologies, such as Hadoop or Spark.
...
- Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills, with the ability to think creatively and provide innovative solutions.
...
- Strong communication and collaboration skills to work effectively in multidisciplinary teams.
...
- Knowledge of ethical AI practices and regulations is a plus.
...
